background.notes: near-pure black, no gradient, no texture, no vignette detected

depth_of_field.notes: all elements sharp — graphic logo composition, not photographic DoF

composition.notes: heavy negative space top/bottom. Composition horizontal with medal slightly left-of-center, waves extend outward to both sides

wordmark.notes: letters are SOLID WHITE. Color gradient perceived is purely from glow halo, not from letter fill

core_sphere.notes: acts like miniature sun — warm emissive center with falloff to deep amber rim

petals.notes: like soap bubbles or blown glass — nearly transparent, only visible via Fresnel rim highlight and subtle refraction of background/core light

sun_rays_in_core.notes: radial texture behind/around core sphere — like lens flare spokes or corona

waves.notes: feels like long-exposure light trail — volumetric not flat

imperfections.notes: clean synthetic render — no surface noise

key_light.notes: primary illumination IS the core sphere — it lights everything around it

secondary_highlight_on_core.notes: classic 3D sphere highlight at ~135° upper-left, gives volume/roundness

rim_light_on_petals.notes: petals receive rim glow from core emission passing through glass

post_processing.notes: bloom is critical — drives the neon halo aesthetic

style_control.notes: hybrid: photoreal materials with stylized composition and extreme emissive contrast

rebuild_notes: CRITICAL: background is pure black (#010101) — do not add gradient or vignette
CRITICAL: letters NATT/OS are SOLID WHITE, not gradient — all color comes from glow halo
CRITICAL: medal has 8 petals in 2 layers rotated 45°, NOT 6
CRITICAL: core sphere is small (~2.5% canvas width) with HUGE bloom halo extending ~20% canvas width
key light position: upper-left of core at ~10:30 clock position
waves pass THROUGH medal (behind core, in front of petals), not around it
letter glow color asymmetric: NATT side biased blue/purple, OS side biased pink/cyan
render emissive + bloom passes separately for max control
chromatic aberration subtle but present on letter edges
order_of_operations: 1. Lock silhouette: place medal + letters + wave paths at exact measured coordinates
2. Apply material PBR: glass petals transmission, emissive core, neon letters
3. Lighting: single emissive core + upper-left key highlight
6. Composite: base + emissive × bloom + subtle CA
prompt_render: Ultra realistic 3D render of atomic flower medal logo, 8 translucent glass bubble petals arranged in 2 layers rotated 45°, glowing warm orange emissive sphere core with radial sun rays, NATT and OS wordmark in white with neon halo glow (blue-purple on left, pink-cyan on right), three layered light-trail waves passing horizontally through the medal, pure black background, cinematic bloom, photographic precision, high contrast, centered composition, eye-level camera, 50mm lens
negative_prompt: gradient-filled letters, hexagonal petals, 6-petal arrangement, flat 2D look, soft focus, depth of field blur, colored background, vignette, texture noise, plastic sheen, overexposed core, cartoon outlines, pixel art style, retro aesthetic, wave wrapping around medal
